reasoning: Response A had the most genuinely distinct set: it explicitly breaks a different load-bearing assumption per concept (container-becomes-specimen in The Recursion, spectator-becomes-data in The Wet Lab, absence-as-collection in Things That Almost Were, time-as-variable in The Half-Life Wing, visitor-pays-with-own-failure in The Confessional Exchange), each living in a separate conceptual space rather than restyling one idea. Response B matches A on craft and sensory vividness (the Autopsy Theater and House That Survived are excellent) but clusters internally: the Vault of Withheld Verdicts, Participation Floor, and Erosion Garden cover the same verdict/rigged-task/decay axes A also uses, slightly compressing its range. Response C lands two sharp ideas (Successful Failures as flawless execution of the wrong objective, the Apology Factory organized by victims) but its entries are thinner and less developed, and the Hall of Almosts plus Broken Rehearsal recycle the near-miss and rigged-repetition tropes the other two handle with more depth.
